title: Aira elegans
intro: Aira elegans, also known as Hair Grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Aira elegans include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Aira elegans is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in the production of herbal extracts and tinctures.
